Short description:
Key Features

\n
    \n
  • A delicate yet almighty 2-stage sharpening tool. One side is sharpening slots, the other is a gripping station for controllability.
    • \n
  • The two slots should be used under different circumstances. Ceramic slot wears off metal and should be used for dull/chipped knives. Tungsteel steel slot polish and refine a sharpened edge.

  • Not only is it convenient to use, being lightweight makes the sharpener portable so that it can be carried around at any time.
